notes:
DCA Admissions Suite v2.7.7 Release Notes

DCA Admissions Suite v2.7.7 strengthens the admissions workflow by adding payment-gated admission letters and student enrollment control.

New Features
- Added Acceptance Fee tracking.
- Added Paid workflow status.
- Added Acceptance Fee dashboard count.
- Added Acceptance Fee fields: Paid status, Paid date, Amount, Payment method, Receipt number, Received by.
- Admission Letters are now blocked until Acceptance Fee is marked as paid.
- Batch Admission Letter sending now separates eligible and blocked applicants.
- Added individual Enroll Student action.
- Added batch Enroll Students action.
- Added automatic creation of a Students sheet through the Apps Script backend.
- Added duplicate enrollment protection using Application Reference and Admission Number.
- Added enrollment fields: Enrolled, Enrolled date, Enrolled by.

Workflow
Application Submitted > Entrance Result: Admitted > Offer of Admission Sent > Acceptance Fee Paid > Admission Letter Sent > Student Enrolled

Fixes and Improvements
- Fixed Acceptance Fee batch update failure caused by the backend rejecting Paid.
- Improved batch update error messages to show the actual failure reason.
- Restored visibility of the Save button in individual application records.
- Updated version metadata to v2.7.7.
- Updated installer script for v2.7.7.
- Fixed PyInstaller version file format for successful builds.

Backend Update Required
Deploy DCA_Admission_Backend_v2_7_7_Unified.gs to Google Apps Script and publish a new web app version.
